name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: ALERT: Court Packing Is HERE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
This is not a drill! Supreme Court majority GONE? PeterThis is HUGE, and YOU need to know this.This week in the Judiciary Committee, I watched as the liberals' long-rumored **[PACK THE COURT](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) **bill became real. They want to END the conservative majority on the court by increasing the justices from nine (currently) to 13, adding four seats **for Joe Biden and the liberal Senate to confirm! ****Pro-Life Values. The 2nd Amendment. Religious Freedom. What else could be at risk under a permanent liberal majority?** And who do you think their four liberal LIFETIME appointments to the court would be? [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [[ JOIN FITZ ] - Defend the Supreme Court!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) **Ranking Member Jim Jordan and I** are going to fight this in the Judiciary Committee with every ounce of fight we have. We've already gotten started, and we won't rest until this horrible idea is DEAD. The radical left is going to be watching this debate closely, and they're going to COME AFTER Those of us who are brave enough to stand up and fight. I'm going to need to rely on friends and supporters like you to back me up! **And we need to take back the House in 2022, so we can stop ideas like this from coming back again and again! **Appointing and confirming **THREE** Supreme Court Justices is the defining legacy of President Trump and our Republican Majority. The liberals could undo it and appoint **FOUR** new justices in one fell swoop if this plan passes.That's how big this moment is.**And that's how important it is that you STEP UP and help me stop this![Please, click here ASAP to join me!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-t/)**-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-i/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-d/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mdttljt-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-h) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mdttljt-ahkdjtlkr-k/)

Defunding the police... _is a mistake._

[CHIP IN $100 >>>](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9414431/224717773/198153/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=46d6c342)

[**BACK THE BLUE**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9414431/224717773/198153/9/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a794d167)

Ending incarceration and releasing dangerous and violent criminals onto our streets is a disaster waiting to happen... _and one we could avoid entirely._

[**Can I count on you to chip in to help conservative patriots across the country bring back LAW AND ORDER to our cities?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9414431/224717773/198153/10/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=0e9a7be2) Day after day, in the face of animosity, our officers put their lives on the line to serve our communities. And right now they need to know we have their backs.

The Left will not stop until they've wiped police departments off the map and destroyed our nation in the process.

[**Only you can help us back the blue and keep our country safe!**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9414431/224717773/198153/11/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f8f56221)

Congressman Burgess Owens

name: Michelle Steel
subject: SURVEY: Are Californians’ taxes too high?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Governor Newsom continues to raise taxes to pay for ineffective government programs.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJ0OCxtx4FUMK-o6C1fI42YUpD0n_SB6S-k9qRCzZcmUGKITvUNARhXr6Cblbd72oEcEJ7Z_y2WIaLfmo4G6ITGWliOexEfqCwpGlIUXs7wAsd-QYhkEkLlxKddS35d0lOIqBBu18LgnTYRSaPH4_XG0I2H4-sTLIPRh_1xfmZilLqEx2W0_wUlHr8JLw0woWAxxeyrjd4_oJBH8PdlpXWJ6wMNWelWzrrs8nPaql7dF85S3tGx3Bl0AjuR3wb_KACcgqGK4JTmpQ_a4J4mQj9MAELrtHUN4PJrNCzsh-XUVA45sUaUPM4ysRkw44jO3sDkV9fdURPs11sOW4H41LQRYSJbbsXIrdW8pbOAPAPQzOoPfGULyVPF5k0EeBo35hZb3g2hiIHxYbH9UTdZ3I3qtg1ECo713Zg7O55MnVJlFJhcFqS757w==&c=AmAp5HQ3S6ETs_GzzLWQlOwwpNY4xnxo-9gNs-yQyYKDT5HTW_GaQA==&ch=oEfRTAAa1Naq2BToATiUYpD7eJeooyezIc6ZvRecCXuq6TmI9u9khQ==)[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJ0OCxtx4FUMK-o6C1fI42YUpD0n_SB6S-k9qRCzZcmUGKITvUNARhXr6Cblbd72oEcEJ7Z_y2WIaLfmo4G6ITGWliOexEfqCwpGlIUXs7wAsd-QYhkEkLlxKddS35d0lOIqBBu18LgnTYRSaPH4_XG0I2H4-sTLIPRh_1xfmZilLqEx2W0_wUlHr8JLw0woWAxxeyrjd4_oJBH8PdlpXWJ6wMNWelWzrrs8nPaql7dF85S3tGx3Bl0AjuR3wb_KACcgqGK4JTmpQ_a4J4mQj9MAELrtHUN4PJrNCzsh-XUVA45sUaUPM4ysRkw44jO3sDkV9fdURPs11sOW4H41LQRYSJbbsXIrdW8pbOAPAPQzOoPfGULyVPF5k0EeBo35hZb3g2hiIHxYbH9UTdZ3I3qtg1ECo713Zg7O55MnVJlFJhcFqS757w==&c=AmAp5HQ3S6ETs_GzzLWQlOwwpNY4xnxo-9gNs-yQyYKDT5HTW_GaQA==&ch=oEfRTAAa1Naq2BToATiUYpD7eJeooyezIc6ZvRecCXuq6TmI9u9khQ==) Friend,

The residents of California pay some of the highest taxes in the country! **Governor Newsom continues to raise taxes to pay for ineffective government programs from his ivory tower in Sacramento.** These tax increases hurt small businesses during a time when they are strained due to widespread shutdowns. I wanted to take this opportunity to ask if you believe Californians are spending too much in taxes?

**DO YOU THINK CALIFORNIANS PAY TOO MANY TAXES?** | **[YES](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJ0OCxtx4FUMK-o6C1fI42YUpD0n_SB6S-k9qRCzZcmUGKITvUNARhXr6Cblbd72oEcEJ7Z_y2WIaLfmo4G6ITGWliOexEfqCwpGlIUXs7wAsd-QYhkEkLlxKddS35d0lOIqBBu18LgnTYRSaPH4_XG0I2H4-sTLIPRh_1xfmZilLqEx2W0_wUlHr8JLw0woWAxxeyrjd4_oJBH8PdlpXWJ6wMNWelWzrrs8nPaql7dF85S3tGx3Bl0AjuR3wb_KACcgqGK4JTmpQ_a4J4mQj9MAELrtHUN4PJrNCzsh-XUVA45sUaUPM4ysRkw44jO3sDkV9fdURPs11sOW4H41LQRYSJbbsXIrdW8pbOAPAPQzOoPfGULyVPF5k0EeBo35hZb3g2hiIHxYbH9UTdZ3I3qtg1ECo713Zg7O55MnVJlFJhcFqS757w==&c=AmAp5HQ3S6ETs_GzzLWQlOwwpNY4xnxo-9gNs-yQyYKDT5HTW_GaQA==&ch=oEfRTAAa1Naq2BToATiUYpD7eJeooyezIc6ZvRecCXuq6TmI9u9khQ==)**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Seen on FOX News:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
He falsely claimed that our campaign is funded by corporate PACs.
#

_Hi there — Tucker Carlson spewed vile, hateful lies about Mondaire and our movement on his show this week. Mondaire wrote this message below addressing many of these lies, but we have to address one of them up here:**he suggested that our campaign is funded by corporate PACs.**_
_Mondaire has never taken money from corporate PACs and he never will. Instead, our campaign relies on grassroots support from progressives like you._
_**[Please make a donation to help re-elect Mondaire today — in Tucker Carlson’s honor. We’re sure he’ll appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27812892/281263005/-353013480?refcode2=3747980b-989f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210417-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3OTgwYi05ODlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8flvy0PB025f7VLthNMfnRoiQgLSbM17huCoN09HFK8=)**_
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27812893/281263006/-353013480?refcode2=3747980b-989f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210417-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3OTgwYi05ODlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8flvy0PB025f7VLthNMfnRoiQgLSbM17huCoN09HFK8=)**
* * *
This week, I earned the distinct honor of receiving a vile shoutout from Tucker Carlson on FOX News.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27812894/281263007/-353013480?refcode2=3747980b-989f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210417-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3OTgwYi05ODlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8flvy0PB025f7VLthNMfnRoiQgLSbM17huCoN09HFK8=)
On Thursday, I was proud to introduce the _Judiciary Act of 2021_ , which will re-balance the Supreme Court by adding four seats after the GOP packed it with a 6-3, far-right majority that is hostile to our democracy.
I assume that you don’t watch FOX News, but I wanted to take the opportunity to set the record straight here.
First, Tucker Carlson claimed that, despite being a Member of Congress, working in the Obama Justice Department, and graduating Stanford and Harvard Law School after growing up in poverty, I have “produced essentially nothing” — and that nothing about the Supreme Court “is real” to me.
That couldn’t be further from the truth. As an openly gay, Black man who was raised by a single mom in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, I know exactly what’s at stake if we fail to unrig our democracy. I’ve gone without health insurance. Every June, I await the Supreme Court’s decisions to see whether my basic human rights are affirmed or denied.
Unlike Tucker Carlson, a racist, trust fund kid, I know what it’s like to succeed in spite of the odds. Tell me again that this isn’t “real” to me.
Then Tucker aired a video from this campaign about court expansion and suggested it was “too well-made” for my campaign to be funded by grassroots supporters, and that I must have corporate PACs bankrolling our movement. That couldn’t be further from the truth — I’ve never accepted corporate PAC money a day in my life, and I never will.
**[I need your help countering Tucker’s lies. Can you make a contribution to my campaign here?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27812895/281263008/-353013480?refcode2=3747980b-989f-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210417-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3OTgwYi05ODlmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8flvy0PB025f7VLthNMfnRoiQgLSbM17huCoN09HFK8=)**
Once he stopped hurling personal insults at our movement, Tucker called us “brazen hypocrites” who want to “wreck” the Supreme Court.
In reality, we’re fighting to expand the Court because Republicans already wrecked it. They stonewalled President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee Merrick Garland for a year, then rammed through Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation just days before the last Presidential election.
Tucker Carlson can point fingers at this movement all he wants. The only way Republicans can hold on to power is if we let them get away with their brazen power grabs over the last several years.
**We must unpack and restore balance to the Supreme Court by passing the _Judiciary Act_. If we fail to do so, we risk losing decades of progress and losing even more power to white supremacists like Tucker Carlson and his following in the Republican Party.**
So stay mad, Tucker. Our movement is just getting started.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: Rick Scott
subject: Trump’s conservative Supreme Court majority—GONE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Not since Ronald Reagan has a U.S. President had the opportunity to appoint THREE justices to the Supreme Court. President Trump had that opportunity and made THREE historic nominations to that sacred bench.

Not since Ronald Reagan has a U.S. President had the opportunity to appoint THREE justices to the Supreme Court. President Trump had that opportunity and made THREE historic nominations to that sacred bench.

Neil Gorsuch: **CONFIRMED**

Brett Kavanaugh: **CONFIRMED**

Amy Coney Barrett: **CONFIRMED**

President Trump and Senate Republicans secured a conservative majority on the Supreme Court to keep the Democrats in check. [**Can I count on you to chip in to help conservative patriots across the country bring back LAW AND ORDER to our cities?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tpCFXCln1m3XW4UOzCqgZ-gzC4OQRymNd2gIsoHRx4qSnWPberOJj0FYYIEgEMLEj2K615Ny7cGEJvNk1-pB6PjniKNe_VjOt7p4DsFPAnIVw8YVjI2pT3JYqiOZu2zJxR-9kk0PLaTzZIEzbii3s26KhWkwseHnNFOUFJXgHPWcIWwU9uv_mHsOLarmTwWy6QE8HNeS5hQ0_PAC3nPu5lDD8lMSWtALDSc_6JXR27pgWBp-hwZdfOlJq48ESQpRHWNi6kJmIr-0uB8uKKuxDyGUTDUWjDJppggc0SF-mpu-yjY0F2wbbhUffcC1cUjaHcy4pLlJ__xhkATyJwS_vPOYFnz_-RAnHNSADqgSSjeQtVPGPx4WGFIwFHfR1sMqwW5VloaeWjdDQ2BooJQV2j-WfOQgnU9Sf6IEjjyucBTzfuH6qTR0xQ==&c=KdLlbAxMi4_WfHgcHuUdsxt1CU5CMhaIFYoCp9fwyGlEsyEGiI3LXg==&ch=PznM1iiRirbeNAHhlIl6C0qv-Zn2rPAGemmbTF9LO5nMWeUmfz2jKg==) Day after day, in the face of animosity, our officers put their lives on the line to serve our communities. body:
Dems Plan on Packing the Court

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2676057795764cb28f371cbc54ff089b&_e=_Lt8izmr0AX1TKXuATaDDbhfTmGNUCvJ5n2e0C1F1DCgUH7uRxqQA3AyepPnQk0cOSSmAxu3Q5Ebu8ESdIBCl4lSe8rkxK52ba5S5cPdtc4iNuMLcPgfEq1mvXNRUxPP_AyhPrskcHERfF64NiBfwgZzzcGAQqwW4SCdWBUn9_azaASS1wLllGqYjY7HQyXIKh3kgf8HiKpUxyPOU6qdtfoVTUy5LDX1vFJkCks3kdNlfBSuHsMQN5YdKkFIfT1uJ_fqcFSKHnYIlaCMBlQ9_iyL3sGz8x21QwYBKgeTEVBvkYxOLRqtQy5fRTpZUwZo_rLDi9B4qSI2uB6hCc92yKqt6XzmGV4UHDAxpaR5W9t6GqhktkzF_Pc4KqC9sbpPyn9AufQnFFcEvfmcaRT1DZUBjUWY7DUtZ0arXhqFvEMJ2S9IHMNJ2JTU2OH-3Q3E5_AM-DhM76k26VaD4LwF609boE4wsc9WTdnQdc_xV5X-aYOb_9rnoXtxDqoX1d8pZo9He15EQrxx78eDDQuU_jepIu5krZTR-bwUIRKJ8M7YZOBLAmK8W_tIJaWzgtVB)
---
Friend,

The Democrats just introduced the most **FRIGHTENING** bill since I have been in the House of Representatives. House Democrats are proposing that we add **FOUR** new judges to the Supreme Court.

Now, why should you be concerned?

In 2004, **Hugo Chavez of Venezuela did the same exact thing!** Chavez took such a prosperous nation and **DESTROYED** it with his Socialist lunacy, and this Democrat bill is straight out of the same handbook. Chavez stacked the courts, and now the Democrats want to do the same thing.

**If Democrats are successful, soon we won’t be able to recognize this country.**

This plan is nothing more than a dangerous, radical power grab that would cement a Liberal bend to the Court for generations to come!
| [**STOP THE SOCIALIST COURT-PACKING SCHEME**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2676057795764cb28f371cbc54ff089b&_e=_Lt8izmr0AX1TKXuATaDDbhfTmGNUCvJ5n2e0C1F1DCgUH7uRxqQA3AyepPnQk0cOSSmAxu3Q5Ebu8ESdIBCl4lSe8rkxK52ba5S5cPdtc4iNuMLcPgfEq1mvXNRUxPP_AyhPrskcHERfF64NiBfwgZzzcGAQqwW4SCdWBUn9_azaASS1wLllGqYjY7HQyXIKh3kgf8HiKpUxyPOU6qdtfoVTUy5LDX1vFJkCks3kdNlfBSuHsMQN5YdKkFIfT1uJ_fqcFSKHnYIlaCMBlQ9_iyL3sGz8x21QwYBKgeTEVBvkYxOLRqtQy5fRTpZUwZo_rLDi9B4qSI2uB6hCc92yKqt6XzmGV4UHDAxpaR5W9tDjF7lQHPP0c_G_SNI5iC6ZQwb4QrXV6mXbkDwNHUaqXxY77b0jKj7ptfuEkv-r6e6QbLQrbHLggpITqw47XlfHXnv-dHVGT9Hjbd04Ul8J0b-HN7PiWHlYgHImeloJkYYA7VuwRthliGxIzPYiKglH2hBnzD4hHPmExf3Xu4mpKR4WR7d3l47P0sj3kUNyJ1MX8T4vARwkVcUMAQnzFTj)
---

The Supreme Court isn't political...**one-party control of courts and packing them with one-party ideologues is what they do in Venezuela, NOT AMERICA.** Dictators do this kind of stuff, and I’m appalled that the Democrats think they can get away with destroying our nation at the highest levels.
[**PROTECT THE SUPREME COURT**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2676057795764cb28f371cbc54ff089b&_e=_Lt8izmr0AX1TKXuATaDDbhfTmGNUCvJ5n2e0C1F1DCgUH7uRxqQA3AyepPnQk0cOSSmAxu3Q5Ebu8ESdIBCl4lSe8rkxK52ba5S5cPdtc4iNuMLcPgfEq1mvXNRUxPP_AyhPrskcHERfF64NiBfwgZzzcGAQqwW4SCdWBUn9_azaASS1wLllGqYjY7HQyXIKh3kgf8HiKpUxyPOU6qdtfoVTUy5LDX1vFJkCks3kdNlfBSuHsMQN5YdKkFIfT1uJ_fqcFSKHnYIlaCMBlQ9_iyL3sGz8x21QwYBKgeTEVBvkYxOLRqtQy5fRTpZUwZo_rLDi9B4qSI2uB6hCc92yKqt6XzmGV4UHDAxpaR5W9sQKvICQ4uM_554BnwgIinXeBA8dwA2mil3z4D5JhUMbMR38ShGS4qFhkrnKbLtJARf0JDG4GNd_gpIx2RBmHJuON4-30OaiJ3vOQeR87pxAOBOGLRov-rMIgIONiiKOpRklJpuM2PErIsvUU6aeziW5lNgC9k8eSaGBEe8yAus020b_MeukzFx1kTNffg7rRGH06JxgH3b5-vHFkjLxeg8)
---

The Supreme Court is the last and final defense that we have to protect our freedoms. [**Let’s keep it that way.**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2676057795764cb28f371cbc54ff089b&_e=_Lt8izmr0AX1TKXuATaDDbhfTmGNUCvJ5n2e0C1F1DCgUH7uRxqQA3AyepPnQk0cOSSmAxu3Q5Ebu8ESdIBCl4lSe8rkxK52ba5S5cPdtc4iNuMLcPgfEq1mvXNRUxPP_AyhPrskcHERfF64NiBfwgZzzcGAQqwW4SCdWBUn9_azaASS1wLllGqYjY7HQyXIKh3kgf8HiKpUxyPOU6qdtfoVTUy5LDX1vFJkCks3kdNlfBSuHsMQN5YdKkFIfT1uJ_fqcFSKHnYIlaCMBlQ9_iyL3sGz8x21QwYBKgeTEVBvkYxOLRqtQy5fRTpZUwZo_rLDi9B4qSI2uB6hCc92yKqt6XzmGV4UHDAxpaR5W9si2KzBroFdnUsRpTQetnTUbYToFHCVJUDi-XfOtidEFZAXeAbNcRRIIrPAo3FK9E2_43PxJckfDfDSkDd3HQQG2u4DMftjTCfeFYK3lokisw8rV9gAhmVK8rQZ5FChzkt-aTwuq-dO4ASvKnbFGMQ0bkEznWgUODZUOTu9Co4ck80w4yfbriwwHN8gYeCdJusdcaTXaB2To0vC8mT66nim)

[**This is the reason we need to keep fighting to ensure we defend my seat and win the house back in 2022.**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=2676057795764cb28f371cbc54ff089b&_e=_Lt8izmr0AX1TKXuATaDDbhfTmGNUCvJ5n2e0C1F1DCgUH7uRxqQA3AyepPnQk0cOSSmAxu3Q5Ebu8ESdIBCl4lSe8rkxK52ba5S5cPdtc4iNuMLcPgfEq1mvXNRUxPP_AyhPrskcHERfF64NiBfwgZzzcGAQqwW4SCdWBUn9_azaASS1wLllGqYjY7HQyXIKh3kgf8HiKpUxyPOU6qdtfoVTUy5LDX1vFJkCks3kdNlfBSuHsMQN5YdKkFIfT1uJ_fqcFSKHnYIlaCMBlQ9_iyL3sGz8x21QwYBKgeTEVBvkYxOLRqtQy5fRTpZUwZo_rLDi9B4qSI2uB6hCc92yKqt6XzmGV4UHDAxpaR5W9tADed0aA98rbFptL7IuZflH0MCtDG8elghzHu3ghAAE0comZrEQB1_lfuiulZc-FCNCnR2pSaQGl1gAkKj-sXKOHzZjqrh7DIUpy48iusqR0-irYCsq7UYWrcl9qnWd8NosjfQQnDdiY4qLn6kRN47r9Cq6eWw6IqBVKtaBTxFUj21Cb7Pr2mMNi1qwikf50uwxcURr2ZzPKeRjYibxBmE)

Thank you,

Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis

body:
It's been over 20 days since Kamala Harris has been named "crisis manager" for Joe Biden's border crisis. [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_NwXaGQLeY3zV_AKG7Yzo8-rTboeHZ5zhWYxsBYzWxc50ADXytYCm1pM6CaD2FMLfMaHlGFMYuHFRVkpsRVq9L-KPkiMfLCvpQvLIkCdHFmnTz810LJNA9CIV63w853DOyq2CUpM-rOAK1QVai_5ekmONMq7Wrfoyg2UtmLLo9B3fSKw8kmgxTqn1KJklG_X-4l_XFn0VjkPawU60e8_7LCmufEG_CltUWY0srwR4BpmuhdV14EEvbT7rfG5uQWrURxhfB2l68XScKO_HXJlxKBEwrie_sXlGAdpIvKJmYDy_DefLRU2UjHGawH-RgwQnF-VfLXJ9Wuvi9F6R_iA8QyJLy7ZwAErJGjyClxiIdiRTfBorwY8Mkw8Dlui3_KuEaAv5TMXWk2YBcWtp_-EMSuc%3D) | |
---
Fellow Mississippian,
It’s been over 20 days since Kamala Harris has been named “crisis manager” for Joe Biden’s border crisis. But Kamala has yet to visit the border! And she has said she has no plans to any time soon!!!

According to experts, an estimated **1,000 illegal immigrants have been crossing the border daily and _are un-pursued._**

**_That’s 20,000 illegal un-pursued crossings just since Harris was tapped to lead this effort! _**

Instead of working for the American people, Biden has doubled down, obstructing border wall construction. As American communities struggle under Biden-Harris policies, and gangs, smugglers, and human traffickers profit, Kamala is still nowhere to be found!
[**Tell Joe and Kamala to _GET TO WORK!_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_NwXaGQLeY3zV_AKG7Yzo8-rTboeHZ5zhWYxsBYzWxc50ADXytYCm1pM6CaD2FMLfMaHlGFMYuHFRVkpsRVq9L-KPkiMfLCvpQvLIkCdHFmnTz810LJNA9CIV63w853DOyq2CUpM-rOAK1QVai_5ekmONMq7Wrfoyg2UtmLLo9B3fSKw8kmgxTqn1KJklG_X-4s17k5kUyAWAJYNwYt0oXOeXbZ12d64xpohOFgA_nz3nIijYt57xPa0PzjpwnqeaWACAhuCZ_epGknRNLqHbcCwUrYDPwvNhzwGyGbGp91dog7LLeZiCz7kNrA5CYk91oQoeihQss04BwsmL5giOCZI1GxvhduTm5uz3Lfv-JqDd4IlpJIA1amehGS4IicotrspJzKi6RelvIHSgNn-3WCQ%3D)
To make matters worse, the Biden administration is continuing to spread misinformation about the border crisis.

They claim the “vast majority of the families” crossing the border illegally are being sent back, while the **REAL** facts from the CBP show that only [32% of family units](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_NxphpOViFUxTSImveYDtenoy3k0rc8Up4PlfR9b0le-OAGVDrf4hY_Jp8r8UaGVxTg6-G-hTLdCkHagFRIgwKklpi7Q6bj6abaz1Qy15lRZ5sId2FF4XZgUXwplnJ6GvPG4L-fmdWSBA0mQbF-7oA5Yy3WNR_v9bLmBxVDAVgj6QGm0BS6bYFpjqRmLJ4D1yVALQ3TiXTR-vUYndnDEA55XH8t6fcnt-QisxMN588IA2U7DZuraXtRJkijlfKmQxjRcXJT4nH8GN3QM5Su7k_eueTwFiwq8NrytmSLL5ouNddsf-VsIdEf_m6_W7QtRaR4Ak2Rp60eqw9W-m0C3kCZ-gH536Ph3MWrALyiF6610e3a8NZRAO7KDYCWLHqbwAVg%3D%3D) were expelled in March.

The Biden administration claims that migrants are not attempting to cross the border illegally because of his policies. **But migrants have been[telling](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_N12Pl684MFxExGPkNQd4tArTLnlxWFX3-XejRCeiE5xvEc0pfyuTkjuW5rjwjlP0xePc9s-QhdWR9QlFYmUFDFr0wlxaOCkZPfVdLo5XXwyrMbzdo389oZGvGOvCsjfzkzjWQg81GBVEKfsNInrb0mGBYwk6xvbNs3YUaGSzpQAy4JCrJNSQ7d8zoB8u3Ecc_sSEPcrnzGwQlCwHB3SCvsRzOiZwumv6GRDxNQy150ov4m_0JK_Sy38nCAQSqqcM6lZ7_pB2tsJPba2mSXw2fxEgX84wvDic8H7xlNqyIx5cfe5mfENJzr9SsUzDur_1ZRLp0QMiYflpeumi3RIbyGY34mp7LKQrWNIBngQiBYFVs8Saj204pSMM1rUxqrlz7w%3D%3D) reporters they are crossing because of Biden and some are even wearing [Biden t-shirts](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_N8OEUo8hUf7oTZseVPI-_C-6UqR6WhVxstcZH6ZCLsEUV2yUmCONmNgAS_a40O94DPankJgwuRBWhFy0tHTgkPP315nAprQjYDczvRTNsJfFLfegpBN6PwfrfpxRSAfGcKVVcTo4NgDJsc92ZF8qQukuy793SVHJGn_Ik2zP9v0-2UWKdx22dSZ-oanFl7QKgRbhNbBsH9bm2hwbikc3Lz2lBe6OZGAnELtC-OHcyJiN-oekylVigyMDReZYVS6N1uPKWGOd0pcwjdDKltnVy2pGqatmMHvPOXYBkzP-7FA7Fx7iWRZFuwpDj10TJ2p5aw6dGAOMG_5FVT9hC-e2VC9g8wZNSnJenFkegv3LTgFznFnYlu0Cdrln063T8Fl3CJyEQ7tXdfSiOGlKnUJOMl0%3D)!**
Obstruction, mistruth, and failing policies – Biden’s border agenda is such a disaster. He simply does not care about the health and safety of American families!
[_**Help us hold the Biden administration accountable >>>**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=f296db71306c46c3b89adfb9344bf755&_e=UttsSdRJeAoYrgft04J_NwXaGQLeY3zV_AKG7Yzo8-rTboeHZ5zhWYxsBYzWxc50ADXytYCm1pM6CaD2FMLfMaHlGFMYuHFRVkpsRVq9L-KPkiMfLCvpQvLIkCdHFmnTz810LJNA9CIV63w853DOyq2CUpM-rOAK1QVai_5ekmONMq7Wrfoyg2UtmLLo9B3fSKw8kmgxTqn1KJklG_X-4u4OMrZKZQ9hUxIsSnHj7gqY4n3r19y7Ky2zjOWZ4QG_HaaF35p0u9UW3XXB8wIFveX0MTcK94N4XghKcxEmezUDvsNdquwrdY_4ju-MIEw4erT5k6MiEXwBK253Fulz-t0c4KkN1cLjZzB0sZWwOQTOcVhOQ6zPcVVcEZHkYTMCiR0_JhU5iWzc4NGEJ8FvGA6x50SFMBr8uZnY7dhVyvk%3D)

Thank you for your support.
Frank Bordeaux

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: The anger. The pain.
body:
#

Friends,
Eight years ago today, and just months after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School, the U.S. Senate voted down an effort to expand background checks.
Do you remember how you felt that day?
The anger.
The pain.
The disappointment when 46 Senators looked at the most benign and practical solutions offered by moderates from both parties and then looked over their shoulder at the powerful, shadowy gun lobby and brought shame on themselves by choosing to do nothing.
Some of those who blocked this lifesaving legislation then are still in the Senate today. Some are even up for re-election. And they will have a chance to vote on background checks again once the Senate brings the new background checks bill to the floor.
And our job remains: either we must pass commonsense legislation to keep our communities safer from gun violence, or we must elect a Senate that will. So today, we are asking:
[**Can we count on you to make a $3 contribution to pass universal background checks? Do it today. Especially today. Send a message that we are in this together until the fight is won.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadff5/3683052731/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210417-1-a")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadff6/3683052731/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210417-1-a") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadfc9/3683052731/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210417-1-a")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadfc8/3683052731/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210417-1-a") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadfcb/3683052731/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210417-1-a")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadfca/3683052731/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210417-1-a") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadff7/3683052731/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210417-1-a")
---|---
Our democracy's history is littered with names we neither remember nor celebrate -- people who stood in the way of progress while protecting the powerful.
Eight years ago, a number of senators voted to join that list. Let's make sure that history does not repeat itself when background checks are brought to the Senate floor for another vote.
With your help, we can get this legislation passed. And we'll remember the names of senators who voted it down.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadff5/3683052731/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MTctMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210417-1-a")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee154/78fba3aa/6395dd00/50aadfcd/3683052731/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

subject: re: want to make sure you get yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:

**BIDEN AND DEMOCRATS PACKING FOUR LIBERAL SUPREME COURT JUSTICES**

**Our worst nightmare has come true --Democrats have introduced legislation to add FOUR far-left and progressive Justices to the Supreme Court.**

****[STOP COURT PACKING](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zAwiAOSC_GOW40CcnXeVk0wxOYt4KyW1UU4hDswisbbt9s8gCyFdih6qj9pEL5O2Y4dGE28s1eQAE-OzFC9zveBlGP6auja1iaDoYII1qbaIPK0Qi8y0nfjA4B8M9puDyvcz-IkS3Qt1p0gy1A2fwBKd-swSbmbYQugBlnZgd0DUJOStBjOphFBkG38YrOjqSlK1Kq_KJ9_jIuVgtnq83Uad8trybCx0xjs7UtKGiPy0DH1dqXNzyUmtifRXCYd8d9Fj63aHULEp4a1J0N5zQUtPiVO63UqXk67e3Un9xezwb689_g2sz56uoLvyFdWBLF1NBKYgKjUwXKFDf270NevayW6nzr1MhC4LfZ04jNsjXE38WpQybLtpi8ra__KujyzXpVwMuTS7GmaJdwYp_QaJih7Zn-0ra_weSjkhYSLXHcTBYdwiCA==&c=DQWAoBc5w5WBNtVZ6Og8zbvZoxOcdijQmZO5lzPCZ5kQ1Bd0wBPdQQ==&ch=JYiwmU9zBJDw2JYue-mSumcKn5XsIy5P8CVdSUBiowMCB34Vd7y65Q==)****

**We 've reached out to you before on this issue but it's do or die at this very moment. **We're desperate and we're begging you for your help.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Nancy Mace
subject: re: covid passport
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
This "woke"-ness is irresponsible, and frankly, it's outrageous. I hope you'll join me to stand up to this MOB now. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=4bea0642b1ac4408a9e31f1dfeaa247f&_e=mLJQPNWZVLttgS5EKjyPpuuHQ8DGwIcAZmpkp4uUEhr0RFV9PBTzSM-Ma6egwyX3eHkHvfR4kHekH8_d0EnGn_KDouR7C_BrUTTd9GcopJk39FedemUblOmXeIeaH4tVcB1JTwDchexVsk00RLZeutQSR6NLYhDs6IDYc8yUGZUC72MH93Z_MeIPo2x4POrvWwTVnWOjKLfHIVWTYbOD3S8_XKbF0kIkDblrQ-X0WdPSA7i58Y9ivRRI64FwzQ0_J9qhKwKbjjZNJolYo5Vwmei47u6R8Y5Ck5ZnCHch5tVHH7I3mgAQGHLnh-CJGlKMOZN5AnMKJdJ6OW4sjHf8tToV5xapW_ZxbiHUDyPDXHPmtQ9EDn6XwqbKFA26lVxHjncGRwxLYKcA_A2Yi7CGYktHWIdfUXXlN4IpxR7hO0tRE7xMcHbWZuWr7EjApU_dtdX41HoxYKVw4m1_unb5X_wAkfJtISpe0yOqp8phLIxtm-MUFzeSYb-FOPvRQrX1) Friend, Over the past year, we have all seen the toll of the Coronavirus regulations. Tens of millions of lost jobs. Millions of small businesses are gone, even the work of a lifetime or several generations. Many won’t be coming back. Our children have suffered through isolation, ineffective learning, and psychological harm that we will be dealing with for years to come. Children don’t learn well this way, especially the younger ones. Local government officials and teachers unions forced unscientific rules on our families. We know these problems, but do we know the source? Well, that's easy... Government. **That's why we have to stand up now before they go ANY further. NO more shutdowns. NO more mask mandates. And NO vaccine passports!** Will you join me today by signing my petition? [**SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=4bea0642b1ac4408a9e31f1dfeaa247f&_e=mLJQPNWZVLttgS5EKjyPpuuHQ8DGwIcAZmpkp4uUEhr0RFV9PBTzSM-Ma6egwyX3eHkHvfR4kHekH8_d0EnGn_KDouR7C_BrUTTd9GcopJk39FedemUblOmXeIeaH4tVcB1JTwDchexVsk00RLZeutQSR6NLYhDs6IDYc8yUGZUC72MH93Z_MeIPo2x4POrvWwTVnWOjKLfHIVWTYbOD3S8_XKbF0kIkDblrQ-X0WdPSA7i58Y9ivRRI64FwzQ0_J9qhKwKbjjZNJolYo5VwmZdf5s8gda5enCeK0gCuP9hezaxvNQJvpZrIoQSbS1ClzPC2XoT7xvnpIf_GGX4slGpAKjW_Zon-XrJDLwkeumJHDHHQ-NVsmzIauyxwiW4ymQ9NhbHlPYIc3bZRH75zAwXX1EaA00gz_DyI_j8cUQ9ePE7J71lhh08glbuLLgGGGymsq73LzL-_wiyhkXcQMg7baUfCUF7Pq2T60d6VbTKg23Uv6UseY3YLbQx0HL3i) It is clear we allowed a slippery slope of government abridgment of our rights that will have long-lasting implications as well — and we need to stem the tide of slowly giving our freedoms away. The latest attempt by the government comes in the form of vaccine “passports” in which you will have to prove your status in order to travel or even do everyday activities in public. Free men and women should stand up and say no to this government overreach. Friend, it’s never been more obvious that the petty tyrants seizing power in this time of crisis have created this issue and it's up to us to put an end to their nonsense. Local officials who might mean well governing by fear but who govern without consequence. **[STAND UP>>](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=4bea0642b1ac4408a9e31f1dfeaa247f&_e=mLJQPNWZVLttgS5EKjyPpuuHQ8DGwIcAZmpkp4uUEhr0RFV9PBTzSM-Ma6egwyX3eHkHvfR4kHekH8_d0EnGn_KDouR7C_BrUTTd9GcopJk39FedemUblOmXeIeaH4tVcB1JTwDchexVsk00RLZeutQSR6NLYhDs6IDYc8yUGZUC72MH93Z_MeIPo2x4POrvWwTVnWOjKLfHIVWTYbOD3S8_XKbF0kIkDblrQ-X0WdPSA7i58Y9ivRRI64FwzQ0_J9qhKwKbjjZNJolYo5VwmfO4k3eYPEUVpADpHw0slrdQAru0zf3RhlAeG5JDOVJoBTazcYGdxw7M2c6-nzIbAeHSqqFyoUN8bVV7qRldfZrY9y-86iZiUMaogMa0YqiWPlNjVpu0yPxCyb7ERdWf83RqyYXedtKttzUeQ7hgdOdfaaW1uWKn8ZFCfDIYca1wHD9fEiy2MxXNAUSkBQKN838c2OfsWA0P1z8keDpxNcu2-ml1PgR04odfGuwViq8B) ** Let me ask you a question: Do you think one single government employee lost their job during this pandemic? The answer is no. While these elites shut down, collected their paychecks, and went about their business. Now, they want to make sure they keep their thumb on you. If you resist, you will be branded as someone who doesn’t care enough. clean_body: This "woke"-ness is irresponsible, and frankly, it's outrageous. I hope you'll join me to stand up to this MOB now. Friend, Over the past year, we have all seen the toll of the Coronavirus regulations. Tens of millions of lost jobs. Millions of small businesses are gone, even the work of a lifetime or several generations. Many won’t be coming back. Our children have suffered through isolation, ineffective learning, and psychological harm that we will be dealing with for years to come. Children don’t learn well this way, especially the younger ones. Local government officials and teachers unions forced unscientific rules on our families. We know these problems, but do we know the source? Well, that's easy... Government. That's why we have to stand up now before they go ANY further. NO more shutdowns. NO more mask mandates. And NO vaccine passports! Will you join me today by signing my petition? It is clear we allowed a slippery slope of government abridgment of our rights that will have long-lasting implications as well — and we need to stem the tide of slowly giving our freedoms away. The latest attempt by the government comes in the form of vaccine “passports” in which you will have to prove your status in order to travel or even do everyday activities in public. Free men and women should stand up and say no to this government overreach. Friend, it’s never been more obvious that the petty tyrants seizing power in this time of crisis have created this issue and it's up to us to put an end to their nonsense. Local officials who might mean well governing by fear but who govern without consequence. Let me ask you a question: Do you think one single government employee lost their job during this pandemic? The answer is no. While these elites shut down, collected their paychecks, and went about their business. Now, they want to make sure they keep their thumb on you. If you resist, you will be branded as someone who doesn’t care enough. That’s what they do. But I want to stand up and say clearly: I care too much to let them keep doing this to our society, our economy, and our freedom. You have the right to work, live, and go about your day-to-day life without the other’s permission and certainly without the government monitoring it for you. Today, we should draw a line in the sand. We cannot keep doing this. The government cannot keep the freedoms it took away from us over the course of the past year. Join me today to say NO to the vaccine passports: Thank you, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |
